subject: [PATCH v7 11/20] nfsd: apply the notify mask to the delegation when requested

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch updates the NFS server to apply a notify mask to directory delegations when requested by clients. The notify mask is set based on the client's request, taking into account whether they require notifications for directory offset information or ordering. If the client doesn't request notifications or requires them but can't be supported by the Linux server, the notify mask is zeroed out. The granted notification mask is also stored in the delegation's dl_notify_mask field to allow later encoding of notifications.
